phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows stabilization from 80.4 dBA to sustained 60.4 dBA. Speech event detected at 76s mark with confidence 0.9. Moderate noise levels present; some distraction possible but manageable.

phase_2.correlations: The shift toward continued motion aligns with GPS signal stabilization. Audio channel demonstrates notable transitions.
phase_2.holistic_assessment: Session exemplifies near-optimal conditions: minimal acoustic disturbance (60.4 dB), variable positioning, and strong focus indicators. Duration (175s) borderline for sustained concentration assessment.

phase_3.recommendations: Current 175s sessions reasonable; consider testing longer 30-min blocks. Establish dedicated seating to minimize postural shifts and maintain focus.

reason: Score weighted toward audio environment (60.4dB—moderate), variable positioning, and session duration (175s). Overall favorable conditions.
